# Twent - Personal Agentic OS for Android
# https://twent.xyz
# Last Updated: April 19, 2026

## Overview
Twent is a personal agentic operating system for Android that combines AI assistance, automation, terminal access, and privacy-first architecture. It's designed for developers, power users, creators, and enterprises who want a powerful, private, and extensible AI assistant on their Android devices.

## Site Structure

### Main Pages

#### Home Page (https://twent.xyz/)
The main landing page showcases Twent's core features:
- Hero section with "Your Personal Agentic OS" headline
- Feature sections for developers, automation, privacy, and marketplace
- Testimonials from users
- Pricing overview
- Download links

#### Pricing (https://twent.xyz/pricing)
Pricing plans and feature comparison:
- Free tier with core features
- Pro plan ($20 once) with additional benefits
- Enterprise pricing for teams

#### Documentation (https://twent.xyz/docs)
Complete documentation including:
- Installation guide
- First setup and configuration
- Chat features and customization
- Tools reference (40+ tools)
- Automation and workflows
- Packages and marketplace
- Memory and voice features
- Settings and toolbox

### Blog

#### Blog (https://twent.xyz/blog)
Articles and updates about Twent:
- Product announcements
- Feature deep dives
- Tutorials and guides

#### Marketplace Blog Post (https://twent.xyz/blog/marketplace)
Detailed explanation of the marketplace feature:
- What the marketplace is
- What you can sell (skills, workflows, mini apps, etc.)
- Pricing structure (pre-revenue vs post-revenue)
- Creator benefits
- Future roadmap

### Use-Case Landing Pages

#### AI Agent for Developers (https://twent.xyz/ai-agent-for-developers)
Target audience: Software developers
Key features:
- Claude Code and OpenAI Codex integration
- Full Ubuntu terminal with apt, Python, Node.js
- Git and GitHub CLI
- SSH client and server
- Multi-model AI support
Comparison with: ChatGPT Mobile, Termux, Cursor/Windsurf Mobile

#### Android Automation Power User (https://twent.xyz/android-automation-power-user)
Target audience: Power users and automators
Key features:
- UI automation (tap, swipe, scroll, type, screenshot)
- Visual workflow builder
- Full Ubuntu terminal
- 1000+ app integrations
- Tasker integration
- Floating chat overlay
Comparison with: Tasker, MacroDroid, Termux

#### Privacy-First AI for Android (https://twent.xyz/privacy-first-ai-android)
Target audience: Privacy-conscious users
Key features:
- BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)
- Local AI models (MNN)
- Zero telemetry
- Encrypted local storage
- Full data ownership
- No account required
Comparison with: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini

#### Terminal on Android (https://twent.xyz/terminal-on-android)
Target audience: Developers and system administrators
Key features:
- Full Ubuntu 24.04 environment
- apt package manager
- Python, Node.js, Go, Rust support
- Git and GitHub CLI
- SSH client and server
- No root required
Comparison with: Termux, Android Terminal, other terminal apps

#### AI Marketplace for Creators (https://twent.xyz/ai-marketplace-creators)
Target audience: Content creators and developers
What you can sell:
- AI skills and behavior bundles
- Workflow automation templates
- Mini apps (HTML/CSS/JS)
- Prompt templates
- Custom skins and themes
- MCP server configurations
Comparison with: Gumroad, Notion Templates, GitHub Sponsors

#### Enterprise AI Agent (https://twent.xyz/enterprise-ai-agent)
Target audience: Teams and businesses
Key features:
- Team management and collaboration
- Centralized admin dashboard
- Compliance and audit controls
- SSO and identity management
- Custom workflow deployment
- On-premise deployment options
- 24/7 dedicated support
Comparison with: ChatGPT Enterprise, Copilot for M365, custom solutions

## Technical Details

### System Requirements
- Android 8.0+ (API 26)
- arm64-v8a architecture
- 3GB RAM recommended
- 500MB+ free storage
- No root required

### Key Technologies
- Ubuntu 24.04 chroot environment
- MNN for local AI models
- Composio for 1000+ app integrations
- Accessibility Service for UI automation
- AIDL for inter-process communication

### Privacy Architecture
- All data stored locally on device
- API keys encrypted with Android KeyStore
- No telemetry or analytics
- No data collection
- Open source and auditable

### Marketplace Architecture
- Skills: Reusable AI behavior bundles
- Workflows: Multi-step automation templates
- Mini Apps: Interactive HTML/CSS/JS applications
- Prompt Templates: Battle-tested prompts
- Custom Skins: Themes and cosmetic badges
- MCP Servers: External tool integrations

## Use Cases

### For Developers
- Code review on commute
- Quick bug fixes from anywhere
- AI pair programming in bed
- Git operations on the go
- Terminal access everywhere

### For Power Users
- Morning routine automation
- Social media management
- File organization
- App testing automation
- Data entry automation

### For Privacy-Conscious Users
- Local AI processing
- BYOK for API access
- No cloud dependency
- Encrypted storage
- Full data ownership

### For Creators
- Sell AI skills
- Sell workflow templates
- Sell mini apps
- Sell prompt templates
- Monetize expertise

### For Enterprises
- Customer support automation
- Sales enablement
- Development productivity
- HR and recruiting
- Legal and compliance

## Comparison Tables

### AI Agent for Developers
| Feature | Twent | ChatGPT Mobile | Termux | Cursor/Windsurf Mobile |
|---------|-------|----------------|--------|------------------------|
| Claude Code & Codex | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | Limited |
| Full Ubuntu Terminal | ✓ | ✗ | ✓ | ✗ |
| Git Integration | ✓ | ✗ | ✓ | ✓ |
| 1000+ App Automations | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Multi-Model Support | ✓ | GPT Only | ✗ | Claude Only |
| Privacy (BYOK) | ✓ | ✗ | ✓ | ✗ |
| Free Tier | ✓ | Limited | ✓ | Paid Only |
| Offline Mode | ✓ | ✗ | ✓ | ✗ |

### Android Automation Power User
| Feature | Twent | Tasker | MacroDroid | Termux |
|---------|-------|--------|------------|--------|
| UI Automation | ✓ | Limited | ✓ | ✗ |
| Visual Workflow Builder | ✓ | ✗ | ✓ | ✗ |
| Full Ubuntu Terminal | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✓ |
| 1000+ App Integrations | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| AI-Powered Decisions | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Floating Chat Control | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Tasker Integration | ✓ | N/A | ✗ | ✗ |
| Free Tier | ✓ | Paid | Freemium | ✓ |
| Memory & Context | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |

### Privacy-First AI for Android
| Feature | Twent | ChatGPT | Claude | Gemini |
|---------|-------|---------|--------|--------|
| BYOK (Your API Keys) | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Local AI Models | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Zero Telemetry | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| No Account Required | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Encrypted Local Storage | ✓ | N/A | N/A | N/A |
| Data Export/Import | ✓ | Limited | Limited | Limited |
| Offline Mode | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Open Source | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ | ✗ |
| GDPR Compliant by Design | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |

### Terminal on Android
| Feature | Twent | Termux | Android Terminal | Other Terminals |
|---------|-------|--------|------------------|-----------------|
| Full Ubuntu Environment | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ |
| apt Package Manager | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Python/Node.js/Go/Rust | ✓ | Partial | ✗ | ✗ |
| Git & GitHub CLI | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ | Limited |
| SSH Client & Server | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ | Limited |
| No Root Required | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Multiple Sessions | ✓ | ✓ | Limited | Limited |
| Nerd Font Support | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ | ✗ |
| Background Processes | ✓ | ✓ | Limited | Limited |

| Automation Capabilities | ✓ | Limited | Limited | Custom |

## Pricing Structure

### Pre-Revenue (Current)
- Website APK distribution
- Everything is free
- AI ads (using koahlabs.com)
- No marketplace
- No cosmetic badges

### Post-Revenue (Future)
- Play Store distribution
- Everything still free
- AI ads (with removal option in Pro)
- Marketplace with commissions
- Pro plan ($20 once) includes:
  - Ads removal
  - Cosmetic badges
  - Early access to features
  - No commissions on marketplace

## Contact Information
- Website: https://twent.xyz
- Documentation: https://twent.xyz/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/user/operit
- Email: sales@twent.xyz (for enterprise inquiries)

## License
Twent is open source. Check the GitHub repository for license details.

## Version Information
- Current Version: Check GitHub releases
- Android Compatibility: 8.0+ (API 26)
- Architecture: arm64-v8a
- Last Updated: April 19, 2026
